choices.text: Sensors (star trackers arcsec accurate, sun sensors, gyros) + actuators (reaction wheels conservation-of-momentum, magnetorquers in LEO, thrusters) + Kalman filter fusion. 3-axis stabilized standard. JWST sub-arcsec; Hubble 10 arcsec.

Momentum dump: use thrusters or magnetorquers (LEO only) to bleed off momentum. Wheel spins back to nominal. Periodic maintenance — saturate every days/weeks depending on disturbances (gravity gradient, solar pressure, drag).
